ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the component */,
  "component_description" TEXT /* Description of the component */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "ticket_number" TEXT /* Ticket number assigned to the issue */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Brief summary of the issue */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project associated with the issue */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component affected by the issue */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version linked to the issue */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned as the owner of the issue */,
  "issue_type" TEXT /* Type of the issue (e.g., bug, feature request) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the issue (e.g., minor, major) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the issue (e.g., open, in progress, resolved) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the issue was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the issue was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the issue */,
  "estimated_effort" INTEGER /* Estimated effort required to resolve the issue */,
  "actual_effort" INTEGER /* Actual effort spent resolving the issue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, project manager) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue that was changed */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change made (e.g., status update, comment added) */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value before the change */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value after the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_history_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue on which the comment was made */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the comment was made */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attachments" (
  "attachment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attachment */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue on which the attachment was made */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the attached file */,
  "file_content" TEXT /* Content of the attached file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attachment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attachments_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id")
)
